value.title: Dow Jones Futures: Mixed Market Signals As Micron's Gain Is Apple's Pain
value.summary: The Nasdaq reversed lower again while the Dow came off record highs. Micron soared but Apple led other tech titans lower.

value.title: Stock Market Today, June 25: Apple Drops After Raising Device Prices to Offset Higher Memory Costs
value.summary: On June 25, 2026, Apple’s price hikes across Macs and iPads put investor focus on margins and consumer demand.

value.title: S&P 500 Ends Flat As Apple Weakness Offsets Micron Gains, Nasdaq 100 And Dow Post Modest Gains — MSFT, QCOM, SPCX, BMBL, SONO In Focus
value.summary: icron stock soared 16% on strong Q3 earnings, while Apple slipped after increasing prices of Macs and iPads.
